high_level_description: Professional real estate listing infographic. Modern luxury marketing design, photo overlay layout. Color scheme: charcoal black, gold, white, off-white, warm brown. Strong typographic hierarchy. All text must be rendered with perfect legibility.

style_description.aesthetics: modern luxury real estate marketing, charcoal black, gold, white, off-white, warm brown color palette

compositional_deconstruction.background: Exterior photo of a residential property, attractive architecture, professional real estate photography

elements.desc: Large headline in elegant serif font, positioned prominently in upper area
Property address in smaller text below headline
Listing price in bold large text, visually prominent
Property details — beds, baths, square footage in small caps
Agent name and brokerage in footer area, smaller text
